title: What Would You Do
questions: What would you do if you lived in Iraq?
What would you do if you could fly?
What would you do if you met your hero?
What would you do if you failed your English test?
Where would you go if you could visit any country?
Where would you live if you could live in any country?
What would you eat right now if you could eat anything?
What would you do if you broke your arm?
What would you do if I tried to shoot you?
What would you do if you could leave here early?
What would you do if your friend was upset?
What would you do if you found lots of money?
What would you do if there was an earthquake?
